subject: PSYC
course_description: In this course we will examine the underlying causes of human behavior and traits, focusing particularly on the use of quantitative and molecular genetic methods (i.e., twin and adoption studies, genome-wide studies) to disentangle genetic and environmental influences.
course_notes: QTM 100 or QTM_OX 100 or ECON 220 or ECON_OX 220 or ISOM 350 or POLS 310 or POLS 310W or MATH_OX 117 or equivalent transfer credit as prerequisite.
requisites: QTM 100 or QTM_OX 100 or ECON 220 or ECON_OX 220 or ISOM 350 or POLS 310 or POLS 310W or MATH_OX 117 or equivalent transfer credit as prerequisite.
